---
name: Pull request
about: Contribute a change to TPT Q Phase
---

## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Source files carry `SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT OR Apache-2.0`
- [ ] Added/updated tests where appropriate
